name: Yummy Peanut Butter Cookies/Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Grease cookie sheet lightly.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, and baking powder into a bowl.
4. Cream margarine and peanut butter in another bowl until creamy.
5. Gradually add brown sugar replacement, continuing to work until light.
6. Add granulated sugar replacement and egg; beat well.
7. Mix in dry ingredients thoroughly.
8. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto cookie sheet.
9. Flatten cookies with the tines of a fork in a criss-cross pattern.
10. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until done.
11. Makes 18 cookies.
Nutritional information per cookie: calories - 45 Diabetic Exchanges
per cookie: 1/4 Bread, 1/2 Fat, 1/4 Lean Meat.
